category_sources: Official lighttpd documentation covers web server configuration and modules.
source_facts.description says small memory footprint, flexible web-server.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and project site use the lighttpd name.
docs_sources: Official lighttpd Redmine wiki page is the Documentation Overview for core features and modules.
repo_sources: Official lighttpd git hosting lists lighttpd1.4 as the stable lighttpd 1.4.x repository.
